posts.author: kkovriga (Katerina Kovriga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone

We recently published a guide on tracking Time in Status in monday and thought it might be useful for teams trying to analyze workflow performance.

The article explains how to:

• build a Time in Status report
• identify workflow bottlenecks
• automatically receive Time in Status and Status Changes reports

Hope it helps someone optimize their workflow!

Time in Status BER1200×750 45.9 KB
